step1.cardTitle: 1. Drop your leads in. We handle the rest.
step1.cardDescription: CSV, CRM export, or direct API integration. 15 minutes to launch.

bulletPoints.reawaken: Dormant leads, ghosted contacts, even the ones your team gave up on
bulletPoints.segment: Auto-segmented by intent, value, and last interaction

step2.cardDescription: AI that reads intent, handles objections, and knows when to hand off to your team.
step2.overlayDescription: Natural language processing for human-like chat • Seamless hand-off to human staff when needed

bulletPoints.response: Responds in seconds, any time of day
bulletPoints.followUp: Speaks their language, matches your tone
bulletPoints.languages: Knows when to push and when to hand off to your team
bulletPoints.humanTakeover: Built on proven sales frameworks that handle objections naturally
bulletPoints.selling: Smart follow-ups that re-engage unresponsive leads automatically

step3.cardDescription: Qualified leads land on your calendar. You see everything in real time.

bulletPoints.calendar: Qualified leads land directly on your calendar
bulletPoints.support: Supports bookings, reservations, and direct sales
bulletPoints.optimization: Weekly optimization so results improve over time
bulletPoints.dashboard: Live dashboard with every conversation and metric
